introSection: Hurricane is a steel roller coaster located at E-World in Daegu Metropolitan City, South Korea.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On August 16, 2019, a 22-year-old part-time employee had to have his leg amputated after it was crushed by the roller coaster. An investigation was launched into safety procedures at the park.

fullText:
Hurricane is a steel roller coaster located at E-World in Daegu Metropolitan City, South Korea.





On August 16, 2019, a 22-year-old part-time employee had to have his leg amputated after it was crushed by the roller coaster. An investigation was launched into safety procedures at the park.
